# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: LinkerdNamespaceAuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  destinations:
  - action: ALLOW
    match:
      labels:
        linkerd.io/control-plane: enabled
  - action: ALLOW
    match:
      ports:
      - port: 8086
        protocol: tcp
  - action: ALLOW
    match:
      services:
      - name: istio-ingressgateway
  - action: ALLOW
    match:
      services:
      - name: istio-webhook
  - action: ALLOW
    match:
      services:
      - name: linkerd-controller
  - action: ALLOW
    match:
      services:
      - name: linkerd-proxy-injector
  - action: ALLOW
    match:
      services:
      - name: linkerd-viz
  - action: ALLOW
    match:
      ports:
      - port: 443
        protocol: tcp
  - action: ALLOW
    match:
      labels:
        app: ingressgateway
  defaultAction: ALLOW
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: LinkerdAuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  destination:
    port: 443
    protocol: tcp
  policy:
    rules:
    - from: []
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: LinkerdDestinationAuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  destination:
    port: 443
    protocol: tcp
  policy:
    rules:
    - from: []
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: LinkerdServiceAccountAuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  destination:
    port: 443
    protocol: tcp
  policy:
    rules:
    - from: []
